objColor.dynamicr: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 1]
objColor.dynamicg: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 1]
objColor.dynamicb: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0, 1]

objColor.dynamicr: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 1]
objColor.dynamicg: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 1]
objColor.dynamicb: If[(step ≥ 5) ∧ (step ≤ 6) ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0, 1]

objColor.dynamicr: If[mode ≟ 0, If[flipDiagonals, ϕ - π, ε - π], If[step ≟ 5 ∨ step ≟ 6, 0.6, 0]]
objColor.dynamicb: If[mode ≟ 0, If[flipDiagonals, ϕ, ε], If[step ≟ 5 ∨ step ≟ 6, 0.6, 0]]

objColor.dynamicr: If[mode ≟ 0, If[flipDiagonals, α_1 - π, ι - π], If[step ≟ 5 ∨ step ≟ 6, 0.6, 0]]
objColor.dynamicb: If[mode ≟ 0, If[flipDiagonals, α_1, ι], If[step ≟ 5 ∨ step ≟ 6, 0.6, 0]]

objColor.dynamicr: If[mode ≟ 0, If[flipDiagonals, 0, ν - π], If[step ≟ 5 ∨ step ≟ 6, 0.6, 0]]
If[step ≟ 1 ∨ step ≟ 2 ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 1 ∨ step ≟ 2 ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 2 ∨ flipDiagonals ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 2 ∨ flipDiagonals ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ false ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∧ step ≟ 8, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ false ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ false ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∧ step ≟ 8, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ false ∧ step ≟ 7 ∨ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∧ step ≟ 8, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]

objColor.dynamicr: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 1, 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[step ≟ 6 ∨ step ≟ 7 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ true ∨ step ≟ 8 ∧ flipDiagonals ≟ false, 0.5, 0.6]
